narrative:
Bay Village-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,041 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.6 percentage points.
